gaps.impact: Cannot analyze test pass rates, flakiness, or inner loop cycle times

gaps.recommendation: Add Trivy to CI: trivy fs --format json --output .logs/security/trivy.json .

delivery_predictability.details: Good delivery cadence with small commits, minor scope drift detected

test_loop_completeness.details: Inferred iterative testing from commits, but cannot measure precisely

quality_maintainability.details: Most commits small, but some large refactoring commits

security_posture.details: Auth changes properly escalated and reviewed

collaboration_efficiency.details: Effective collaboration with minor scope drift issues

decision_hygiene.details: Excellent escalation compliance, minor gap in rate limiter decision

findings.title: Agent scope drift in refactoring task
findings.summary: Agent added 340 lines of unrelated refactoring while working on auth task
findings.impact: Code review burden, potential for unintended side effects
findings.recommendation: Add explicit scope boundaries to task descriptions

findings.title: Missing decision record for rate limit algorithm
findings.summary: Rate limiting middleware implemented without documented decision
findings.impact: Rationale for algorithm choice not preserved
findings.recommendation: Create retroactive ADR for rate limiting approach

findings.title: Agent context loss observed
findings.summary: Agent asked same question about auth flow 3 times

wins.title: Rapid authentication implementation
wins.description: JWT system delivered in 3 days vs 5 day estimate with zero security issues

wins.title: Strong decision logging adoption
wins.description: 5 decisions logged this sprint, all one-way-doors properly escalated

wins.title: Effective agent delegation
wins.description: Agent handled 18 commits independently with 0 critical bugs

risks.title: Scope drift pattern emerging
risks.description: Agent added unrelated refactoring twice this sprint
risks.mitigation: Add explicit scope boundaries to task descriptions

risks.title: Test result telemetry gap
risks.description: Cannot accurately measure inner loop health
risks.mitigation: Add JUnit XML output to test commands

risks.title: JWT refresh race condition near-miss
risks.description: Race condition identified in code review, fixed before merge

action_items.action: Add explicit scope boundaries to task descriptions

action_items.rationale: Enable inner loop analysis for future retrospectives
Ensure all auth changes have decision records

action_items.action: Add rate limit decision to ADR
